meta.name: Frankie Schulte
meta.siteDescription: Photography by Frankie Schulte — portraits, events, live music, and personal work.

home.headline: Frankie Schulte
home.intro: Portraits, live energy, strange light, and the places between.

work.headline: People, energy, and place.
work.intro: Browse by kind of work, then open an individual shoot to see the full sequence. The categories can grow and change as the portfolio does.

about.headline: I care about how a moment felt—not only how it looked.
body: Hi, I’m Frankie. I make photographs of people, gatherings, performances, and the places I find along the way.

My approach is observant and collaborative. I’ll give direction when it helps, step back when the moment already has everything it needs, and keep the experience relaxed enough for people to feel like themselves.
about.portraitAlt: Temporary demo portrait; replace with a photograph of Frankie.
about.availability: Available for portraits, graduations, events, concerts, editorial work, and select creative projects.

inquire.headline: Tell me what you’re making.
inquire.intro: A date, location, and a little context are enough to start. I’ll reply from my regular email so we can figure out the rest together.
